LuxScaleAI - Uniformity (point-by-point IES grid)
Timestamp: 2026-04-08T23:33:13.863203
Mode: FULL.
Room length (m): 90, width (m): 80, ceiling height (m): 8.0
Required lux: 1000.0, Standard Uo: 0.7
Maintenance factor (design): 0.8; room reflectance preset: Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2)
Work plane z = 0.75 m; fixture grid symmetric on full floor (edge inset = half of centre-to-centre spacing); illuminance grid 5x5 same rule.

========================================================================
Option 1 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1000.50 lx (×0.8981); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=3.3333333333333335, y=3.4782608695652173, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.6666666666666667, y=1.7391304347826086, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 621, phi_each_lm=14500.00, phi_total_lm=9004500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 991.609357
  E_avg (lx): 1120.560000
  E_max (lx): 1228.378516
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.884923
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.807251

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    991.6094   1099.5570   1107.8647   1099.5570    991.6094
   1080.7389   1208.7381   1219.5743   1208.7381   1080.7389
   1087.0615   1217.0233   1228.3785   1217.0233   1087.0615
   1080.7389   1208.7381   1219.5743   1208.7381   1080.7389
    991.6094   1099.5570   1107.8647   1099.5570    991.6094

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 2 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1002.67 lx (×0.8963); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=1.9148936170212767, y=6.666666666666667, edge half-spacing (m) x=0.9574468085106383, y=3.3333333333333335, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 564, phi_each_lm=16000.00, phi_total_lm=9024000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 993.983645
  E_avg (lx): 1122.986667
  E_max (lx): 1225.111796
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.885125
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.811341

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    993.9836   1106.2579   1097.4446   1106.2579    993.9836
   1084.7375   1216.8101   1210.4742   1216.8101   1084.7375
   1091.0746   1225.1118   1219.2992   1225.1118   1091.0746
   1084.7375   1216.8101   1210.4742   1216.8101   1084.7375
    993.9836   1106.2579   1097.4446   1106.2579    993.9836

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 3 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1002.22 lx (×0.8957); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=2.1951219512195124, y=7.2727272727272725, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.0975609756097562, y=3.6363636363636362, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 451, phi_each_lm=20000.00, phi_total_lm=9020000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 984.676200
  E_avg (lx): 1122.488889
  E_max (lx): 1243.197069
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.877226
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.792052

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    984.6762   1102.5992   1121.6536   1102.5992    984.6762
   1075.2579   1212.8440   1234.3881   1212.8440   1075.2579
   1081.5796   1221.1368   1243.1971   1221.1368   1081.5796
   1075.2579   1212.8440   1234.3881   1212.8440   1075.2579
    984.6762   1102.5992   1121.6536   1102.5992    984.6762

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 4 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1000.50 lx (×0.8973); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=3.9130434782608696, y=4.444444444444445, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.9565217391304348, y=2.2222222222222223, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 414, phi_each_lm=21750.00, phi_total_lm=9004500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 992.878381
  E_avg (lx): 1120.560000
  E_max (lx): 1227.036807
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.886056
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.809168

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    992.8784   1099.7401   1107.2838   1099.7401    992.8784
   1081.2895   1208.0368   1218.1130   1208.0368   1081.2895
   1087.7373   1216.4578   1227.0368   1216.4578   1087.7373
   1081.2895   1208.0368   1218.1130   1208.0368   1081.2895
    992.8784   1099.7401   1107.2838   1099.7401    992.8784

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 5 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1002.67 lx (×0.8930); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=1.9148936170212767, y=10.0, edge half-spacing (m) x=0.9574468085106383, y=5.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 376, phi_each_lm=24000.00, phi_total_lm=9024000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 978.289807
  E_avg (lx): 1122.986667
  E_max (lx): 1275.374374
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.871150
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.767061

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    978.2898   1156.5564   1028.3026   1156.5564    978.2898
   1069.3846   1267.0930   1140.6051   1267.0930   1069.3846

    978.2898   1156.5564   1028.3026   1156.5564    978.2898

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 6 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1003.33 lx (×0.8914); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=2.0930232558139537, y=11.428571428571429, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.0465116279069768, y=5.714285714285714, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 301, phi_each_lm=30000.00, phi_total_lm=9030000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 993.411285
  E_avg (lx): 1123.733333
  E_max (lx): 1352.875133
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.884028
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.734296

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 7 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1005.33 lx (×0.8961); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=3.75, y=6.153846153846154, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.875, y=3.076923076923077, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 312, phi_each_lm=29000.00, phi_total_lm=9048000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 1001.552973
  E_avg (lx): 1125.973333
  E_max (lx): 1237.108818
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.889500
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.809592

Fixture positions (x, y) m:

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   1001.5530   1098.8006   1116.9105   1098.8006   1001.5530

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 8 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1002.67 lx (×0.8893); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=1.9148936170212767, y=13.333333333333334, edge half-spacing (m) x=0.9574468085106383, y=6.666666666666667, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 282, phi_each_lm=32000.00, phi_total_lm=9024000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 900.284248
  E_avg (lx): 1122.986667
  E_max (lx): 1278.900920
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.801687
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.703952

Fixture positions (x, y) m:
  1: (0.9574, 6.6667)
  2: (0.9574, 20.0000)

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   1178.9545   1019.8277    900.2842   1019.8277   1178.9545
   1272.5774   1129.0719   1010.3715   1129.0719   1272.5774

   1178.9545   1019.8277    900.2842   1019.8277   1178.9545

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 9 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=1013.33 lx (×0.8953); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=4.7368421052631575, y=6.666666666666667, edge half-spacing (m) x=2.3684210526315788, y=3.3333333333333335, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=8.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 228, phi_each_lm=40000.00, phi_total_lm=9120000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 1005.892786
  E_avg (lx): 1134.933333
  E_max (lx): 1237.553652
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.886301
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.812807
